scripts.db:migrate: sh -c 'set -a; test -f ../../.env && . ../../.env; set +a; exec prisma migrate deploy'
scripts.db:migrate:dev: sh -c 'set -a; test -f ../../.env && . ../../.env; set +a; exec prisma migrate dev'
scripts.db:studio: sh -c 'set -a; test -f ../../.env && . ../../.env; set +a; exec prisma studio'
scripts.db:seed: sh -c 'set -a; test -f ../../.env && . ../../.env; set +a; exec tsx src/seed.ts'
